@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+# Release Workflow
+
+1. Update the version string and build number in `Sources/App/Info.plist`.
+2. Run `scripts/build-dmg.sh`.
+3. Notarize the DMG with Apple before updating `appcast.xml`.
+4. Update `appcast.xml` with the new version, build number, DMG size, download URL, and EdDSA signature.
+5. Commit and push the `appcast.xml` change to `main`.
+6. Create the GitHub release with `gh release create`.
+
+The DMG release remains a manual process. No CI/CD workflow is checked into this repository.
+
+The checked-in `appcast.xml` advertises a single signed Ghost Pepper release, and Sparkle uses the build number from that feed for version comparison.
+
+Update installs preserve user settings and local data because Ghost Pepper stores preferences in user defaults and runtime data under `~/Library/Application Support/GhostPepper`, outside the application bundle that Sparkle replaces.

@@ -200,3 +200,13 @@
 - Rebuilt dictation performance tracing so each session stamps the documented milestones and durations, formats a single `key=value` performance summary with speech-model and cleanup-backend metadata, writes that summary into the Performance log, and clears trace state plus pending OCR prefetches on completion or abandonment.
 - Wired live-session cleanup snapshots through the archive path so raw transcription, cleanup configuration, window context, diagnostic prompt/input/output data, and final text are captured only while the debug viewer is open, while also adding model-category success, retry, failure, and empty-transcription logging.
 **Summary:** Delivered the diagnostics and performance-tracing slice on top of the complete runtime and transcription lab. Ghost Pepper now keeps a live, persisted debug log with viewer-gated sensitive entries, exposes the log in a reusable floating viewer, records full dictation performance traces with the documented session metrics, writes those traces to the Performance category, logs speech-model lifecycle failures under the Model category, and captures cleanup snapshots only while a debug viewer is actively open. No follow-up scope moved out of the iteration during wrap-up because the remaining viewer and trace contracts were closed in place.
+
+## ITER-0020
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-10
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0756, STORY-0757, STORY-0758, STORY-0759, STORY-0760, STORY-0761, STORY-0762, STORY-0763, STORY-0764, STORY-0765, STORY-0766, STORY-0767, STORY-0768, STORY-0769, STORY-0770, STORY-0771, STORY-0772, STORY-0773, STORY-0774, STORY-0775, STORY-0776, STORY-0777, STORY-0778, STORY-0779, STORY-0780, STORY-0781, STORY-0782, STORY-0783
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Audited the existing Sparkle integration already in `AppServices`, `AppController`, `MenuBarMenuView`, `Info.plist`, and the project configuration to confirm the lazy updater wrapper, menu-triggered manual checks, 24-hour automatic checks, package minimum version, and embedded feed and EdDSA settings were already wired to the runtime stories in this iteration.
+- Added the checked-in release-facing update artifacts by committing `appcast.xml` with the single signed v1.9.0 item, adding `scripts/build-dmg.sh` for the documented Release-to-UDZO-DMG packaging and Sparkle signature flow, and writing `docs/release-workflow.md` for the manual notarize, appcast update, push, and `gh release create` sequence.
+- Verified the slice with the full hosted macOS test suite, shell syntax and structural checks for the DMG script and appcast, Info.plist/appcast alignment checks, and a repository sweep confirming the release flow remains manual with no `.github` CI/CD configuration.
+**Summary:** Delivered the runtime-update and release-feed slice on top of the finished menu-bar app. Ghost Pepper now keeps Sparkle lazily initialized behind the existing runtime wrapper, triggers manual checks from the menu while preserving Sparkle's built-in update UI and install flow, ships the documented feed and EdDSA configuration in `Info.plist`, carries a checked-in single-item `appcast.xml` for the v1.9.0 release, includes the manual DMG packaging script used to build and sign the update artifact, and documents the notarized manual release workflow without introducing CI/CD automation. No follow-up scope moved out of the iteration during wrap-up because the remaining release and deployment work stays sequenced in `ITER-0021`.

 ### ITER-0021 — Release and deployment tooling

@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+APP_NAME="GhostPepper"
+DMG_NAME="GhostPepper"
+PROJECT_PATH="$(pwd)/GhostPepper.xcodeproj"
+INFO_PLIST="$(pwd)/Sources/App/Info.plist"
+BUILD_DIR="$(pwd)/build"
+DMG_DIR="$BUILD_DIR/dmg"
+
+VERSION=$(/usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Print :CFBundleShortVersionString" "$INFO_PLIST")
+BUILD_NUMBER=$(/usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Print :CFBundleVersion" "$INFO_PLIST")
+
+if [[ "$VERSION" == *.*.* ]]; then
+  RELEASE_VERSION="$VERSION"
+else
+  RELEASE_VERSION="${VERSION}.0"
+fi
+
+RELEASE_TAG="v$RELEASE_VERSION"
+
+echo "==> Building $APP_NAME v$VERSION (build $BUILD_NUMBER)..."
+
+echo "==> Cleaning..."
+rm -rf "$BUILD_DIR"
+mkdir -p "$DMG_DIR"
+
+echo "==> Building release..."
+xcodebuild -project "$PROJECT_PATH" \
+  -scheme "$APP_NAME" \
+  -configuration Release \
+  -derivedDataPath "$BUILD_DIR/derived" \
+  -skipMacroValidation \
+  build 2>&1 | tail -5
+
+APP_PATH="$BUILD_DIR/derived/Build/Products/Release/$APP_NAME.app"
+
+if [ ! -d "$APP_PATH" ]; then
+  echo "ERROR: Build failed -- $APP_PATH not found"
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "==> Preparing DMG contents..."
+cp -R "$APP_PATH" "$DMG_DIR/"
+ln -s /Applications "$DMG_DIR/Applications"
+
+echo "==> Creating DMG..."
+hdiutil create -volname "$APP_NAME" \
+  -srcfolder "$DMG_DIR" \
+  -ov -format UDZO \
+  "$BUILD_DIR/$DMG_NAME.dmg"
+
+echo "==> Generating Sparkle signature..."
+SPARKLE_SIGN=$(find "$HOME/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData" -path "*/SourcePackages/artifacts/sparkle/Sparkle/bin/sign_update" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
+if [ -n "$SPARKLE_SIGN" ]; then
+  SIGNATURE=$("$SPARKLE_SIGN" "$BUILD_DIR/$DMG_NAME.dmg" 2>&1)
+  echo "$SIGNATURE"
+  echo ""
+  echo "Update appcast.xml with:"
+  echo "  version=$VERSION"
+  echo "  build=$BUILD_NUMBER"
+  echo "  size=$(stat -f%z "$BUILD_DIR/$DMG_NAME.dmg")"
+  echo "  signature=$SIGNATURE"
+else
+  echo "WARNING: sign_update not found -- run a build in Xcode first to fetch Sparkle"
+fi
+
+echo "==> Cleaning up..."
+rm -rf "$DMG_DIR" "$BUILD_DIR/derived"
+
+DMG_SIZE=$(stat -f%z "$BUILD_DIR/$DMG_NAME.dmg")
+
+echo ""
+echo "Done! DMG is at: $BUILD_DIR/$DMG_NAME.dmg ($DMG_SIZE bytes)"
+echo ""
+echo "Next steps:"
+echo "  1. Notarize $BUILD_DIR/$DMG_NAME.dmg with Apple."
+echo "  2. Update appcast.xml with version $VERSION, build $BUILD_NUMBER, size $DMG_SIZE, and signature above."
+echo "  3. Commit and push the appcast.xml change to main."
+echo "  4. Create a GitHub release: gh release create $RELEASE_TAG $BUILD_DIR/$DMG_NAME.dmg --title \"Ghost Pepper v$RELEASE_VERSION\""
